data.title: Chainlink co-founder: The United States should continue to maintain its leadership in the new crypto financial system
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chainlink co-founder Sergey Nazarov attended the White House Crypto Summit: "I am deeply grateful for your serious attitude towards our industry and for the fact that you are actually helping to guide the industry in the right direction. I have worked with central banks in many other countries, and at that time I was wondering, when the whole world is pursuing a higher level of financial system, as an American citizen, why can't I help the US financial system to the next level. Therefore, I am very grateful at this moment that there is finally a new consensus and adoption of these concepts. I and many of you here believe that cryptocurrency, blockchain, and Web3 infrastructure will be the next iteration of the financial system. I believe that the United States should continue to maintain its leadership in this new financial system. I am very happy to see that David Sacks, Treasury Secretary Bessant, and Commerce Secretary Lutnick and others take this issue very seriously, and I am very grateful to them. So, I am very happy about this, and I think it is crucial to the role of the United States in the global financial system. Thank you very much."

data.title: Yesterday, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of US$154.9 million, and Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of US$36.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Farside Investors monitoring, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of US$154.9 million yesterday, and Grayscale GBTC had a net outflow of US$36.5 million.

data.title: Bitcoin mining company Hu8: Bitcoin holdings increased to 10,237
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 released its latest operating data, which disclosed that its mining output in February was 46 Bitcoins, a decrease from 65 Bitcoins in January. Its Bitcoin reserves have now increased to 10,237 BTC (including 968 Bitcoins pledged and transferred to third-party wallets).

data.title: Hut 8 Reports Decrease In February Bitcoin Production
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 has released its latest operational data, revealing a decrease in Bitcoin production for February. The company mined 46 Bitcoins in February, down from 65 Bitcoins in January. Despite the reduction in production, Hut 8's Bitcoin reserves have increased to 10,237 BTC. This total includes 968 Bitcoins that have been pledged and transferred to third-party wallets.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Increases by 1.7 Billion
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 4.1 billion USDC and redeemed around 2.4 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to March 6. This resulted in a net increase of about 1.7 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 57.2 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately 57.4 billion USD. Of these reserves, around 7 billion USD is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately 50.4 billion USD.

data.title: Planet Morning News
MegaETH Co-Founder Discusses Recent RPC Outage and Future Plans
data.description:
According to Foresight News, MegaETH co-founder Lei Yang recently addressed an RPC outage that revealed an intriguing edge case. The incident occurred when debugging RPC method calls led to the server allocating excessive memory for an overly long string, ultimately resulting in memory exhaustion. In response, the MegaETH team has decided to build their own RPC stack to implement various optimizations aimed at enhancing performance. While this approach has yielded positive performance results, it requires the team to manage infrastructure maintenance independently.

Yang anticipates more outages in the future and plans to release additional post-mortem reports, hoping these will spark engaging discussions. He encourages the community to share more edge cases for testing now, rather than encountering issues months later.

data.title: US, EU authorities dismantle Garantex in money laundering crackdown
data.description:
US and European law enforcement agencies disrupted Garantex, a Russia-linked crypto exchange accused of laundering billions of dollars for cybercriminals, drug traffickers, and sanctioned entities, the Justice Department announced Friday. As part of a coordinated operation with Germany and Finland, US authorities seized multiple domains associated with Garantex and froze over $26 million in...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/us-eu-authorities-dismantle-garantex-in-money-laundering-crackdown/

data.title: Solana Rival Sui Defies Crypto Market Slump and Surges Amid New Partnership With Trump-Affiliated DeFi Protocol
data.description:
The layer-1 blockchain Sui (SUI) is defying the broader crypto market downturn after inking a new deal with a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol linked to US President Donald Trump. The Solana (SOL) rival is witnessing price gains amid a new collaboration with World Liberty Financial (WLFI). Says World Liberty Financial co-founder Zak Folkman in a […]
